case_title: GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK VS. JIMMY TRAN et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 15, INCL.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK SERVED OCT-18-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, JIMMY
DECLARATION WAIVER OF INTEREST & ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, JIMMY
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, JIMMY
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $287.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, JIMMY
DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS [CCP 1033] FILED BY PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK
DECLARATION /AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRAN, JIMMY $2,806.59 PRINCIPAL, $287.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,094.09, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, JIMMY DOES 1 THRU 15, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-25-2013
